s, Systems, and Computers November 1998 Jose Luis Pino and Khalil Kalbasi Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT This paper introduces timed synchronous dataflow (TSDF) which enables the codesign of the synchronous DSP and analog RF portions

sign of the synchronous DSP and analog RF portions of an application. The semantics and scheduling techniques of TSDF are detailed. A 16 QAM modem with a QAM synthesizable DSP transmitter, cosimulating with a RF modulator and RF power amplifier is de
g with a RF modulator and RF power amplifier is demonstrated. Send comments to Edward A. Lee at eal at eecs berkeley edu .
